name: Yogurt Cheddar Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in the cheese.
4. Add the yogurt all at once; stir with a fork to make a soft, slightly sticky dough.
5. On a lightly floured surface, knead the dough gently 6 times or until smooth.
6. Gently pat the dough into a 1-inch thick round.
7. Using 2-inch round cutters, cut out rounds.
8. Gather up the scraps and pat the dough once more; cut into rounds.
9. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet at 425°F (220°C) for 12 to 15 minutes or until puffed and golden.
10. Transfer to racks and let cool.
